name: good check-ai-workflow generated core
howToFix: Generated generic projects must keep passing the core workflow asset check.

name: bad check-ai-workflow missing assets
howToFix: The workflow checker must keep rejecting projects that do not have required workflow assets.

name: good engineering baseline enum vs lookup
howToFix: Keep the enum-vs-lookup example complete and free of pending baseline decisions.

name: good engineering baseline api dto domain
howToFix: Keep the DTO/domain example complete and free of pending baseline decisions.

name: bad engineering baseline missing type source
expectStderrIncludes: missing section: Type Source of Truth
howToFix: The checker must keep rejecting baselines that omit Type Source of Truth.

name: bad engineering baseline pending decision
howToFix: The checker must keep rejecting strict baselines with unresolved Open Engineering Decisions.

name: good workflow artifacts task graph
howToFix: Keep the Goal + Subagent L2 example graph consistent across request, preflight, spec, eval, and task.

name: migration workflow artifacts legacy frontmatter warning
expectOutputIncludes: missing artifact frontmatter; migration warning for 0.39.x
howToFix: Legacy no-frontmatter artifacts should keep warning by default until strict schema becomes a separate migration decision.

name: bad workflow artifacts invalid frontmatter
howToFix: The artifact checker must keep rejecting malformed frontmatter when frontmatter is present.

name: good review loop l2 slice
howToFix: Keep the Review Loop L2 example complete with packet, task/spec/eval refs, findings, verification, and bounded follow-up.

name: bad review loop forbidden auto fix
expectStderrIncludes: AUTO_FIX appears to touch forbidden scope
howToFix: The checker must keep rejecting AUTO_FIX findings that touch dependencies or other forbidden authority.

name: bad review loop too many auto fix rounds
howToFix: The checker must keep enforcing the maximum of two AUTO_FIX rounds.

name: good next-step boundary suggestions
howToFix: Keep each suggestion classified with matching Can AI do now and Required entry values.

name: bad next-step boundary direct follow-up immediate
expectStderrIncludes: can only set Can AI do now? = Yes
howToFix: The checker must keep rejecting DIRECT_FOLLOW_UP suggestions marked as immediately executable.

name: bad next-step boundary risk decision missing human queue
expectStderrIncludes: RISK_DECISION must appear in Human Decisions Needed
howToFix: The checker must keep routing RISK_DECISION suggestions to Human Decisions Needed or Human Decision Queue.

name: good goal mode first route
howToFix: Keep the Goal Mode example routed through a legal mode with clear required artifacts and boundaries.

name: bad goal mode invalid selected mode
howToFix: The Goal Mode checker must keep rejecting unknown modes.

name: bad goal mode readonly adoption allows writes
expectStderrIncludes: READ_ONLY adoption must not allow workflow asset writes
howToFix: The Goal Mode checker must keep blocking init-project or workflow asset writes during read-only adoption.

name: good subagent orchestration closed run
howToFix: Keep the Subagent Orchestration example closed, with no RUNNING subagents and one active writer at most.

name: bad subagent orchestration unclosed subagent
expectStderrIncludes: subagent must be closed before final response
howToFix: The Subagent Orchestration checker must reject RUNNING subagents before final response.

name: bad subagent orchestration multiple writers
expectStderrIncludes: more than one active writer is not allowed
howToFix: The Subagent Orchestration checker must reject more than one active writer.

name: good output quality next-step report
howToFix: Keep the example final report human-readable, evidence-backed, and explicit about next safe action.

name: bad output quality low score
howToFix: The score checker must keep rejecting reports without human summary, next safe action, technical details, or audit notes.

name: good glossary usage
howToFix: Keep required glossary terms explained in core/glossary.md.

name: bad glossary usage missing terms
howToFix: The glossary checker must keep rejecting glossaries that omit required human-facing workflow terms.

name: good project onboarding generated project
expectStdoutIncludes: Project onboarding O1 baseline is present
howToFix: Generated generic projects must keep installing onboarding support docs and templates.

name: bad project onboarding missing docs
howToFix: The onboarding checker must keep rejecting projects without onboarding support assets.

name: good workflow version generated project
howToFix: Generated projects must keep receiving a current .intentos/version.json file.

name: migration workflow version mismatch
howToFix: Version mismatch must keep giving an explicit update command instead of silently passing.

name: good platform baseline generated pending
expectStdoutIncludes: Platform baseline is present enough to continue
howToFix: Generated projects without selected profiles should remain non-strict pending, not hard-failing.

name: bad platform baseline strict missing profile
howToFix: Strict platform baseline checks must keep failing until profiles are explicitly selected.

name: good industrial baseline web bl2
howToFix: Keep the Web BL2 example evidence complete enough for strict industrial baseline checks.

name: migration industrial baseline bl2 skip
expectStdoutIncludes: Industrial BL2 checks are skipped until BL2_INDUSTRIAL is selected.
howToFix: BL2-only checks must stay non-blocking before a project selects BL2_INDUSTRIAL.

name: bad industrial baseline strict missing level
howToFix: Strict industrial baseline checks must keep failing until baseline level is selected.

name: bad industrial baseline selects all packs
expectStderrIncludes: BL2 selects all industrial packs by default
howToFix: BL2 selection must reject all-pack defaults.

name: bad industrial baseline risk overlay no evidence
howToFix: Risk overlays must require risk-specific baseline evidence.

name: good industrial pack selected-only no packs
howToFix: Selected-only industrial pack checks must remain lightweight when no selected packs exist.

name: bad industrial pack missing depth contract
howToFix: Industrial packs must keep the 1.16 BL2 depth contract sections.

name: bad industrial pack unknown option
howToFix: Industrial pack checks must keep rejecting unknown options.

name: good claim control example
howToFix: The 1.3 claim control example must keep bounded wording and assumption register evidence.

name: bad overclaimed release
howToFix: Claim control must reject production, guarantee, and simulation-to-production overclaims.

name: bad report as approval
howToFix: Claim control must reject reports that claim to approve release, risk, scope, or future work.

name: bad unmarked assumption
howToFix: Claim control must reject reports that rely on inferred environment or rollback facts without Assumption Register.

name: good manifest current
howToFix: The authoritative manifest must stay aligned with VERSION.md, copy rules, and workflow version assets.

name: migration manifest version mismatch
howToFix: Manifest version drift must keep failing so update/migration plans cannot silently use stale metadata.

name: good fixture runner selected case
args: good engineering baseline enum vs lookup
howToFix: The fixture runner must keep supporting targeted case execution for debugging.

name: good cli fixtures dry-run
howToFix: The CLI fixtures command must keep routing to the fixture runner.

name: bad cli migrate requires safe output mode
howToFix: The migrate command must require --dry-run or --write-plan before producing a migration output.

name: good init dry-run plan
howToFix: Init dry-run must keep producing a reviewable plan without writing target files.

name: good workflow-next generated project
howToFix: workflow-next must keep routing newly generated projects to onboarding before feature implementation.

name: good context governance source
howToFix: The source repo context governance assets, examples, and bad-fixture checks must stay complete.

name: bad learning approved without evidence
expectStderrIncludes: approved learning candidate must include evidence
howToFix: Approved learning candidates must keep requiring evidence before they can become project context.

name: bad context correction missing evidence
howToFix: Approved context corrections must keep requiring new evidence.

name: bad git boundary secret
howToFix: Git Boundary reports must keep rejecting obvious secret-like content.

name: good launch readiness internal handoff
howToFix: Keep the Safe Launch example complete with verification, closed decisions, release boundary, and final readiness.

name: bad launch readiness missing verification
expectStderrIncludes: ready state must include verification evidence
howToFix: Ready states must include concrete verification evidence.

name: bad launch readiness pending human decision
howToFix: Ready states must not leave required human decisions pending.

name: bad launch readiness overclaim
howToFix: Launch readiness reports must not claim production safety or guaranteed approval beyond evidence.

name: good conversation drift control routing
howToFix: Keep conversation turn classification and scope change report routing explicit and bounded.

name: bad conversation drift discussion writes
expectStderrIncludes: DISCUSS_ONLY must not continue current task
howToFix: Discussion-only turns must not authorize writes or current-task continuation.

name: bad conversation drift scope creep
howToFix: Scope changes must route to human decision before changing the current task.

name: bad conversation drift risk auto continue
howToFix: Risk decisions must stop for human decision and must not auto-approve release or production behavior.

name: good first delivery walkthrough booking app
howToFix: Keep the first delivery walkthrough example complete with request, task, launch readiness, final report, human decisions, subagent closure, and simulated evidence labeling.

name: bad first delivery missing final report
howToFix: Adoption Trial Reports must reference the final report when recording a first delivery path.

name: bad first delivery missing launch readiness
howToFix: Adoption Trial Reports must reference launch readiness when recording a first delivery path.

name: bad first delivery overclaim
howToFix: Simulated first delivery walkthroughs must not claim production readiness or production validation.

name: good real adoption governed web readonly
howToFix: Keep the real adoption example read-only, sanitized, bridge-mode bounded, and closed for subagents.

name: bad real adoption overclaim
howToFix: Read-only real adoption reports must not claim production validation, release approval, or safety approval.

name: bad real adoption target write
howToFix: Read-only real adoption reports must record that no target writes were performed.

name: bad real adoption public name local only
howToFix: Public repo evidence must not include concrete private target names unless explicitly approved.

name: good patch classification structural remediation
howToFix: Keep patch classification examples explicit about repair scale, risk, evidence, and non-authorization.

name: bad patch safe local high risk
howToFix: High-risk API, DB, migration, gate, release, permission, or schema surfaces must not be classified as SAFE_LOCAL_FIX.

name: bad patch authorizes implementation
howToFix: Patch classification reports route repair scale only; they must not approve implementation.

name: bad patch do not patch completed
howToFix: DO_NOT_PATCH is a stop signal, not completed work.

name: bad patch false positive unsafe
howToFix: False-positive records must not accept real high-risk API, gate, DB, permission, release, or environment impact.

name: good standard baseline web runtime
howToFix: Keep the 1.14 standard baseline example aligned with resolver output and human-decision boundaries.

name: bad standard pack default enabled
howToFix: Standard packs may be recommended, but must not be active by default.

name: bad standard pack unknown field
howToFix: Standard pack metadata fields must be explicit; experimental metadata belongs under extensions.

name: bad standard pack index entry mismatch
howToFix: standard-baseline-packs/index.json entries must stay aligned with each pack.json.

name: bad standard pack environment overclaims
howToFix: Environment standard packs must record facts only; they must not create .env, store secrets, invent deployment facts, or approve CI/CD.

name: bad standard selection write approved
howToFix: Standard baseline selection must not authorize target-project writes.

name: bad standard selection industrial as standard
howToFix: Industrial overlays must stay separate from standard baseline packs.

name: bad standard selection unknown pack
howToFix: Standard baseline reports must reference pack IDs from standard-baseline-packs/index.json.

name: bad standard selection unknown profile
howToFix: Selected Profiles must use profile ids that exist in profiles/ or .intentos/profiles/.

name: bad standard selection resolver mismatch
expectStderrIncludes: recommended standard packs differ from resolver
howToFix: Strict standard baseline reports must match resolver output or record an explicit resolver override reason.

name: bad platform standard selects all
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard backend forced
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard bl2 default
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard industrial as standard
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard write approved
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard release approved
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard draft stable
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard existing project overwrite
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard unknown pack
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad platform standard resolver mismatch
expectStderrIncludes: recommended standard packs differ from resolver
howToFix: Platform standard baseline reports must stay platform-scoped, conditional, and non-authorizing.

name: bad guided baseline selects all packs
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards must recommend the smallest standard pack set by platform and scope.

name: bad guided baseline bl2 default
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards must keep BL2 selected-only and evidence-required.

name: bad guided baseline forces backend
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards must keep backend/API optional until scope evidence exists.

name: bad guided baseline approves writes
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards are recommendations only and must not authorize target-project writes.

name: bad guided baseline approves implementation
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards must not approve implementation.

name: bad guided baseline approves release
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards must not approve release or production.

name: bad guided baseline production ready
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards must not claim production readiness.

name: bad guided baseline too many questions
howToFix: Baseline Decision Cards should ask no more than 3 to 5 human questions in normal cases.

name: bad guided baseline governed overwrite
howToFix: Existing governed projects must default to read-only mapping or controlled apply, not governance replacement.

name: bad guided baseline production direct init
howToFix: Production-sensitive projects must stay adapter/read-only first unless controlled apply is explicitly approved.

name: bad guided baseline bl2 no evidence gap
expectStderrIncludes: BL2 candidate has no evidence gap
howToFix: BL2 candidate cards must record an evidence gap before industrial packs are enabled.

name: bad guided baseline dirty continues
howToFix: Dirty worktree cards must stop before writes and ask whether to continue read-only, plan only, or wait.

name: good approval record workflow assets
howToFix: Keep the approval record example human-owned, bounded, expiring, and non-executing.

name: bad approval record AI owner
expectStderrIncludes: approval owner must be a specific human owner
howToFix: Approval Records must identify human approval, not Codex, AI, reviewers, subagents, automation, or system output.

name: bad approval record missing plan hash
howToFix: Approved records must reference a specific plan hash.

name: bad approval record all actions
expectStderrIncludes: approved action ids must be explicit
howToFix: Approved records must list exact action IDs and bounded target paths.

name: bad approval record auto apply
howToFix: Approval Records must not authorize automatic apply or say Codex can apply now.

name: bad approval record high risk
howToFix: High-risk actions must stay human-only or blocked outside Approval Record controlled apply evidence.

name: bad approval record wildcard path
expectStderrIncludes: must use exact bounded target paths
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad approval record parent traversal
expectStderrIncludes: must use exact bounded target paths
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad approval record symlink path
expectStderrIncludes: must use exact bounded target paths
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad approval record expired
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad approval record ambiguous owner
expectStderrIncludes: approval owner must be a specific human owner
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad approval record mismatched action id
expectStderrIncludes: human approval statement must match approved action IDs
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad approval record plan changed
howToFix: Approval Record checker must keep rejecting unsafe approval evidence boundaries.

name: bad structured apply plan digest
expectStderrIncludes: plan_digest does not match canonical evidence digest
howToFix: Structured apply plan evidence must reject stale or forged plan digests.

name: bad structured readiness plan digest
expectStderrIncludes: apply_plan.plan_digest does not match referenced apply plan evidence
howToFix: Structured readiness evidence must reference the exact apply plan digest.

name: bad structured approval plan digest
expectStderrIncludes: approved_plan.plan_digest does not match referenced apply plan evidence
howToFix: Structured approval evidence must reference the exact approved apply plan digest.

name: bad strict apply plan missing structured evidence
howToFix: Strict structured evidence mode must reject legacy apply plans without a Machine-Readable Evidence block.

name: bad strict readiness missing structured evidence
howToFix: Strict structured evidence mode must reject legacy readiness reports without a Machine-Readable Evidence block.

name: bad strict approval missing structured evidence
howToFix: Strict structured evidence mode must reject legacy approval records without a Machine-Readable Evidence block.

name: bad structured readiness missing plan reference strict
howToFix: Strict readiness evidence must resolve the referenced apply plan locally before claiming digest linkage.

name: bad structured approval missing plan reference strict
howToFix: Strict approval evidence must resolve the referenced apply plan locally before claiming digest linkage.

name: bad structured readiness empty actions
expectStderrIncludes: structured readiness actions must not be empty
howToFix: Structured readiness evidence must keep action rows non-empty unless the readiness state is NO_APPLY_PLAN.

name: good ordinary first-slice booking
howToFix: Keep the ordinary user first-slice example plain, bounded, and limited to at most three questions.

name: bad first-slice authorizes write
expectStdoutIncludes: boundary This card writes target files must be No
howToFix: First-slice cards must not authorize target-project writes.

name: bad first-slice exposes internal jargon
howToFix: First-slice user-facing sections must avoid internal workflow jargon.

name: bad first-slice too many questions
howToFix: First-slice cards must keep questions to one to three.

name: good product completeness booking MVP
howToFix: Keep the product completeness example complete and non-releasing.

name: bad product completeness release overclaim
expectStdoutIncludes: boundary This report approves release or production must be No
howToFix: Product completeness reports must never approve release or production.

name: bad product completeness missing run
expectStdoutIncludes: checklist missing Local run or demo instructions
howToFix: Product completeness reports must include local run or demo instructions.

name: good MVP booking example
howToFix: Keep the bundled booking MVP example locally runnable with coherent evidence.

name: good MVP dashboard example
howToFix: Keep the bundled dashboard MVP example locally runnable with coherent evidence.

name: good MVP CLI note tool example
howToFix: Keep the bundled CLI MVP example locally runnable with coherent structured evidence.

name: good product completeness structured evidence
howToFix: Keep structured product evidence readable by the product completeness resolver.

name: good low-risk apply candidate
expectStdoutIncludes: Low-Risk Controlled Apply Candidate check passed
howToFix: Keep the low-risk apply candidate example exact, reversible, and non-authorizing.

name: bad apply candidate authorizes apply
expectStdoutIncludes: boundary This candidate authorizes apply must be No
howToFix: Apply candidate records must not authorize apply.

name: bad apply candidate broad path
howToFix: Apply candidate paths must be exact and bounded.

name: bad apply candidate high risk
expectStdoutIncludes: mentions high-risk surface without explicit no-authority boundary
howToFix: High-risk surfaces must stop or include explicit no-authority boundaries.

name: good change impact coverage contract input rule
howToFix: Keep the 1.48 contract input rule example complete across frontend, API, backend, copy, tests, and handoff surfaces.

name: good structured change impact coverage closure
howToFix: Keep the 1.49 structured impact coverage example valid in strict closure mode.

name: good execution closure with required impact coverage
expectStdoutIncludes: linked Change Impact Coverage Report passes strict closure evidence checks
howToFix: Keep cross-surface READY closures linked to strict impact coverage evidence.

name: bad change impact missing structured evidence
howToFix: Strict impact coverage records must include machine-readable evidence.

name: bad change impact placeholder evidence
howToFix: Strict impact coverage DONE evidence must be concrete, not placeholder text.

name: bad change impact closure not started
expectStderrIncludes: closure mode cannot leave required surface FRONTEND_UI NOT_STARTED
closure changed-files backend rule work must close FRONTEND_UI
howToFix: Closure mode must not leave required impact surfaces open after backend rule files changed.

name: bad change impact missing evidence ref
howToFix: Strict evidence reference resolution must reject DONE evidence paths that do not resolve.

name: bad execution closure missing impact coverage
expectStderrIncludes: requires Change Impact Coverage Report found
howToFix: Cross-surface READY closures must cite strict Change Impact Coverage when required.

name: bad change impact coverage backend only
expectStderrIncludes: backend rule change must close FRONTEND_UI
howToFix: The checker must reject backend-only completion for cross-surface rule changes.

name: bad change impact coverage frontend only
expectStderrIncludes: frontend rule change must close BACKEND_RULE
howToFix: The checker must reject frontend-only completion for cross-surface rule changes.

name: bad change impact coverage api without tests
expectStderrIncludes: API contract change needs DONE test coverage evidence
howToFix: The checker must reject API contract completion without test evidence.

name: bad change impact coverage high risk not applicable
expectStderrIncludes: high-risk surface PERMISSION_RISK cannot be NOT_APPLICABLE
howToFix: The checker must reject high-risk not-applicable claims without concrete reasons.

name: bad change impact coverage approval overclaim
howToFix: The checker must reject reports that claim they approve implementation or release.

name: good business rule closure appointment service time
howToFix: Keep the appointment service-time Business Rule Closure example strict and non-authorizing.

name: bad business rule closure authorizes implementation
expectStderrIncludes: boundary must be No: This closure authorizes implementation
howToFix: The checker must reject Business Rule Closure records that claim they authorize implementation.
